title: senecio × heimerlii
intro: Senecio × heimerlii, also known as Heimerli's ragwort, is a hybrid plant species within the Senecio genus, known for its potential medicinal properties. The plant contains senecionine, a pyrrolizidine alkaloid that has been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Senecio × heimerlii include its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, skin conditions, and gastrointestinal problems. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use should be carefully monitored due to potential toxicity.
